summary: Kardex PT (Producto Terminado) Module Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI elements and interactions verified. Fixed date filter bug (asyncpg datetime conversion). Module includes: kardex-pt with pagination, filters (product, tipo_movimiento, company_key, location_id, fecha_desde, fecha_hasta), resumen by product, filtros endpoint.
features_verified: GET /api/kardex-pt - Returns paginated items with tipo_movimiento, entrada, salida, saldo_acumulado - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Filter by product_tmpl_id works correctly - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Filter by tipo_movimiento works (SALIDA_VENTA, INGRESO_PRODUCCION, etc.) - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Filter by fecha_desde and fecha_hasta works (FIXED: datetime conversion) - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Filter by company_key works - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Excludes TRANSFERENCIA from global results (no location filter) - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt - Includes TRANSFERENCIA when filtering by location_id - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt/resumen - Returns totales (entradas, salidas, saldo) and productos list - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt/resumen - Filter by company_key works - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt/resumen - Filter by fecha_desde/fecha_hasta works (FIXED) - PASS
GET /api/kardex-pt/filtros - Returns company_keys, ubicaciones, tipos_movimiento - PASS
Frontend: Kardex PT accessible from sidebar (Inventario FIFO > Kardex PT) - PASS
Frontend: Summary cards (Total Entradas: 2701, Total Salidas: 1528, Saldo Global: 1173) - PASS
Frontend: All filters functional (producto, tipo, empresa, ubicacion, fechas) - PASS
Frontend: Movements table with fecha, producto, tipo badge, entrada, salida, saldo - PASS
Frontend: Product summary table clickable (filters movements when clicked) - PASS
Frontend: Pagination working (44 pages, 50 items per page) - PASS
Frontend: Clear filters button works - PASS

bug_fixed.issue: Date filter (fecha_desde, fecha_hasta) returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fixed.root_cause: asyncpg expects datetime.date or datetime.datetime objects, but string was passed directly
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added datetime.fromisoformat() conversion in kardex_pt.py for fecha_desde and fecha_hasta parameters
lines_changed: Line 1: Added 'from datetime import datetime' import
Lines 200-207: Same fix applied in resumen endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: kardex_pt.py correctly implements movement classification using CASE with EXISTS subquery
Backend: Saldo acumulado calculated with SUM() OVER(PARTITION BY product_tmpl_id ORDER BY date, odoo_id)
Backend: Transfers excluded from global results unless location_id filter is applied
Frontend: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: Product summary table rows are clickable and filter movements correctly
test_credentials: username: eduard, password: eduard123, rol: admin
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing Odoo data (2151 movements, 226 products)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kardex PT module fully tested. Data from odoo schema: 2151 movements (excluding transfers), 226 products with movement. Company keys: Ambission, ProyectoModa. 18 internal locations. Product DAVIDO has 37 SALIDA_VENTA movements. Date filter now works correctly after datetime conversion fix.
